calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena For Production Of Documents Pursuant To Ccp 2029.600
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gavin M. Masuda, Esq. and Katrina Rodarte, ESq. of Latham Watkins LLP, Tel:415.391.0600, for petitioner and moving party;
Mauricio S. Beugelman, Esq. and Erin E. Daly, Esq. of Schiff Hardin, Tel:415298.1181 for respondent and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PETITIONER DELOITTE TOUCHE LLP's Petition To Enforce Subpoena For Production Of Documents Pursuant To CCP 2029.600, with modification, as follows:

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted in its entirety. Petitioner Deloitte & Touche LLP's petition to enforce subpoena for production of documents is granted. Respondent GPS Capital Management, LLC shall produce, no later than August 31, 2019, all non-privileged documents responsive to categories 3, 7, 8, 9, and 15 of the deposition subpoena duces tecum issued by Deloitte, and shall concurrently serve a privilege log with sufficient factual information to enable Deloitte to evaluate the merits of each claim of privilege or protected work product asserted by GPS with respect to any documents withheld on those grounds. GPS shall bear its attorney's fees in reviewing the documents for privilege in response to Deloitte's subpoena.

This ruling stands only on the condition that counsel continue to meet and confer regarding the potential narrowing of the subpoena.

Counsel for petitioner submitted a proposed order for the court's consideration.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

[Order signed after hearing.]

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena For Production Of Documents Pursuant To Ccp 2029.600
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Continued To Aug-13-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. GAVIN M. MASUDA, ESQ. of Latham & Watkins LLP (Tel: 415-391-0600) appearing for petitioner Deloitte Touche LLP;
Atty. MAURICIO S. BEUGELMANS, ESQ. of Schiff Hardin (Tel: 415-901-8752) appearing for respondent GPS Capital Management, LLC.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER DELOITTE TOUCHE LLP'S Petition To Enforce Subpoena For Production Of Documents Pursuant To CCP 2029.600.

Petitioner's counsel stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Respondent's counsel do not stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The matter is continued to August 13, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Respondent's counsel are instructed to pay the required local court reporter fee in advance of the 8/13/19 hearing.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Joanna Broadwell, CSR #10959, Tel: 415-274-9977, E-mail: calendar-ca@veritext.com (302/JPT)
